requirement_topic.en: EDD Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz and Site Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: EDD 并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz 及场址验收
requirement_topic.zht: EDD 併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz 及場址驗收

summary.en: Djibouti's practical low-voltage supply should be treated as 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, supplied through Electricite de Djibouti (EDD). EV charger projects need site-level confirmation of service capacity, metering, earthing, protective devices, harmonics, power quality, load management, and commissioning acceptance with EDD or the project owner. Djibouti imports most of its electricity from Ethiopia's hydro-dominant system and is also pursuing geothermal, wind, and solar capacity, so project reviewers may focus on supply reliability, demand peaks, and local distribution constraints.
summary.zh: 吉布提实务低压供电应按 230 V 单相 / 400 V 三相、50 Hz 处理，由 Electricite de Djibouti（EDD）供电。电动汽车充电桩项目需要与 EDD 或项目业主逐场址确认供电容量、计量、接地、保护器件、谐波、电能质量、负载管理和调试验收。吉布提大部分电力从埃塞俄比亚水电体系进口，同时推进地热、风电和太阳能容量，因此项目审查可能关注供电可靠性、尖峰负荷和本地配电约束。
summary.zht: 吉布地實務低壓供電應按 230 V 單相 / 400 V 三相、50 Hz 處理，由 Electricite de Djibouti（EDD）供電。電動汽車充電樁項目需要與 EDD 或項目業主逐場址確認供電容量、計量、接地、保護器件、諧波、電能質量、負載管理和調試驗收。吉布地大部分電力從衣索比亞水電體系進口，同時推進地熱、風電和太陽能容量，因此項目審查可能關注供電可靠性、尖峰負荷和本地配電約束。

standards_or_laws: Electricite de Djibouti (EDD) project-specific connection and commissioning requirements
Ministry of Energy and Natural Resources electricity-sector oversight
Djibouti low-voltage supply basis: 230/400 V, 50 Hz
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power-quality references where specified

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is nominally 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Djibouti has the same 50 Hz frequency, but the nominal voltage is different at 230/400 V, so China factory settings cannot be assumed to transfer without voltage-range, protection, metering, and thermal checks.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据 GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234 接口、GB/T 27930-2023 直流通信以及当地电网运营商项目验收准备文件。中国国内供电标称为 220 V 单相 / 380 V 三相、50 Hz。吉布提频率同为 50 Hz，但标称电压为 230/400 V，与中国不同，因此不能假定中国工厂设置可直接转用，必须复核电压范围、保护、计量和热设计。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據 GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234 接口、GB/T 27930-2023 直流通訊以及當地電網運營商項目驗收準備文件。中國國內供電標稱為 220 V 單相 / 380 V 三相、50 Hz。吉布地頻率同為 50 Hz，但標稱電壓為 230/400 V，與中國不同，因此不能假定中國工廠設置可直接轉用，必須複核電壓範圍、保護、計量和熱設計。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Confirm the charger input nameplate and tested operating range cover 230/400 V at 50 Hz, not only China 220/380 V. Revalidate voltage trip points, leakage-current devices, metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, surge protection, transformer or rectifier ratings, cooling performance, and load-management settings for the Djibouti site. Prepare single-line diagrams, capacity calculations, earthing details, commissioning records, and EDD or owner acceptance documentation before shipment or installation.
gap.zh: 须确认充电桩输入铭牌和测试运行范围覆盖 230/400 V、50 Hz，而不仅是中国 220/380 V。应针对吉布提场址重新验证电压脱扣点、漏电保护、计量精度、谐波发射、浪涌保护、变压器或整流器额定值、冷却性能和负载管理设置。出货或安装前应准备单线图、容量计算、接地细节、调试记录以及 EDD 或业主验收文件。
gap.zht: 須確認充電樁輸入銘牌和測試運行範圍覆蓋 230/400 V、50 Hz，而不僅是中國 220/380 V。應針對吉布地場址重新驗證電壓脫扣點、漏電保護、計量精度、諧波發射、浪湧保護、變壓器或整流器額定值、冷卻性能和負載管理設置。出貨或安裝前應準備單線圖、容量計算、接地細節、調試記錄以及 EDD 或業主驗收文件。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory — grid-connected installations require EDD or owner acceptance; exact public EVSE grid-code publication was not confirmed, so site-specific EDD requirements must be obtained before deployment
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid acceptance applies domestically and is not an EDD approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Djibouti 230/400 V

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Djibouti shares China's 50 Hz frequency but not its nominal voltage. Treat 230/400 V site validation, EDD capacity review, power-quality evidence, and desert-temperature derating as required project work before shipping a China 220/380 V charger.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 吉布提与中国同为 50 Hz，但标称电压不同。将 230/400 V 场址验证、EDD 容量审查、电能质量证据和沙漠温度降额视为出货中国 220/380 V 充电桩前必须完成的项目工作。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 吉布地與中國同為 50 Hz，但標稱電壓不同。將 230/400 V 場址驗證、EDD 容量審查、電能質量證據和沙漠溫度降額視為出貨中國 220/380 V 充電樁前必須完成的項目工作。
